# In Parallel

> In Parallel is an intelligent management system that connects to your existing tools and meetings to maintain a living execution plan — automatically.

## Product
- [Homepage](https://www.in-parallel.com/): Product overview and value proposition
- [How It Works](https://www.in-parallel.com/#how-it-works): Four-phase AI workflow — Prepare, Capture, Update, Report
- [Integrations](https://www.in-parallel.com/#integrations): Supported tools and platforms
- [Pricing](https://www.in-parallel.com/pricing): Starter, Growth, and Enterprise plans

## Security & Compliance
- [Security](https://www.in-parallel.com/security): ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliance
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.in-parallel.com/privacy-policy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Use](https://www.in-parallel.com/terms-of-use): Terms of service
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.in-parallel.com/cookie-policy): Cookie usage policy

## Company
- [About Us](https://www.in-parallel.com/about-us): Team, mission, and investors
- [Book a Demo](https://www.in-parallel.com/demo): Schedule a personalized demo
- [Join the Waitlist](https://www.in-parallel.com/waitlist): Early access signup

## Resources
- [Insights](https://www.in-parallel.com/insight): Articles on execution intelligence and team management
- [Routine Templates](https://www.in-parallel.com/routines): Pre-built management routine templates

## Optional
- [White Papers](https://www.in-parallel.com/white-papers): Research and thought leadership
- [Careers](https://www.in-parallel.com/careers): Open positions at In Parallel
- [Press](https://www.in-parallel.com/press): Media inquiries
